summary: Replayed ADR 0282 from the merged 0.177.95 mainline baseline using committed source 41653f0bfd2ec29a60796f50ddbf07dce76a6d87, carried Mailpit as the private development SMTP interceptor onto the current 0.130.63 live baseline, re-verified the current Proxmox host and Mailpit runtime state plus a fresh cross-host SMTP capture from monitoring-lv3, and cut release 0.177.96 with no platform-version bump.

verification.check: Focused Mailpit pytest and syntax slice
verification.observed: The merged-tree exact-main compatibility slice reran from committed source `41653f0bfd2ec29a60796f50ddbf07dce76a6d87`; `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with fastapi --with httpx python -m pytest -q tests/test_mailpit_runtime_role.py tests/test_mailpit_playbook.py tests/test_mail_platform_verify_playbook.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_serverclaw_authz.py tests/test_browser_runner_runtime_role.py tests/test_browser_runner_client.py tests/test_browser_runner_service.py` passed with `49 passed in 1.71s`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-targeted-checks-r8.txt`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=mailpit env=production` succeeded from committed source `41653f0bfd2ec29a60796f50ddbf07dce76a6d87` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=115 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=18 rescued=0 ignored=0`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-live-apply-r7.txt`.

A fresh host-state probe confirmed the platform still reports hostname `Debian-trixie-latest-amd64-base` and `pve-manager/9.1.6/71482d1833ded40a (running kernel: 6.17.13-2-pve)`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-host-state-r1.txt`.

A fresh runtime probe on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed the `mailpit` container remained `Up 7 hours (healthy)` on image `docker.io/axllent/mailpit:v1.29.5@sha256:0d7b9c8ed469f400087d9abf1df5b7c7c88b33ae7b8b381ea5a2b153ef27aacf`, with API info showing `Version=v1.29.5`, `Messages=1`, and `SMTPAccepted=18`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-mailpit-runtime-state-r2.txt`.

A fresh probe from `monitoring-lv3` deleted previous Mailpit messages, sent SMTP to `10.10.10.20:1025`, and confirmed exactly one captured message with subject `LV3 Mailpit exact-main verification` created at `2026-03-30T07:25:12.36Z`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-monitoring-probe-r5.txt`.

verification.check: Release automation dry run and release cut
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reported the merged release baseline, `LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch ... --dry-run` planned release `0.177.96`, and the corresponding write run prepared release `0.177.96` while preserving `platform_version: 0.130.63`; the outputs are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-release-status-r3.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-release-dry-run-r6.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-release-write-r4.txt`.

`make validate`, `git diff --check`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` passed on the `0.177.96` release tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-validate-r10.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-git-diff-check-r2.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-live-apply-receipts-validate-r2.txt`.

`make remote-validate` passed with `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-syntax`, `dependency-graph`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `type-check`, and `workstream-surfaces` all reported as `passed`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-remote-validate-r5.txt`.

`make pre-push-gate` passed with `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-lint`, `ansible-syntax`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `dependency-direction`, `dependency-graph`, `documentation-index`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `integration-tests`, `packer-validate`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `security-scan`, `service-completeness`, `tofu-validate`, `type-check`, `workstream-surfaces`, and `yaml-lint` all reported as `passed`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-pre-push-gate-r3.txt`.

`make check-build-server` returned `build-server-ok`, resolved the session workspace under `/home/ops/builds/proxmox_florin_server/.lv3-session-workspaces/ws-0282-main-merge-8eabf5f785/repo`, and completed the immutable snapshot dry-run upload for `codex/ws-0282-main-merge@41653f0bfd2ec29a60796f50ddbf07dce76a6d87`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0282-mainline-check-build-server-r3.txt`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0282 on top of repository baseline 0.177.95 and live platform baseline 0.130.63.
No platform-version bump is recorded here because Mailpit first became true on platform version 0.130.60; release 0.177.96 only integrates that already-live capability onto current main.

An exploratory live `playbooks/mail-platform-verify.yml -e env=staging` run on 2026-03-30 targeted `docker-runtime-staging-lv3` and failed with `Connection refused` on `127.0.0.1:8025` because the current server does not deploy the separate staging guest topology; the authoritative current-server Mailpit proof remains the direct `monitoring-lv3 -> docker-runtime-lv3` SMTP probe captured above.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains part of the audit trail, but the canonical Mailpit receipt for integrated main now points at this exact-main replay.
